ast.name: title
ast.source: Resrt to codeblock config (can only do this once)
ast.target: 重置为代码块配置（此操作仅可执行一次）

ast.name: title
ast.source: Permanentally save all your modifications to the scene
ast.target: 永久保存您对场景的所有修改

ast.name: title
ast.source: Set the scene color
ast.target: 设置场景颜色

ast.name: title
ast.source: Toggle a grid and axis
ast.target: 切换网格和坐标轴

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Now there is a chance you already put a lot of effort into the current setup of your models, unfortunately if you want to keep this setup, you will have to do a bit of manual work. You can review the updated syntax in the
ast.target: 您可能已经在当前模型的设置上投入了大量精力，但遗憾的是，如果您想保留此设置，将需要进行一些手动工作。您可以在

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: and fill in your values for the new syntax.
ast.target: 中查看更新后的语法，并为新语法填入您的值。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Apologies for the inconvenience. But I hope you can keep enjoying the plugin with all its new functions.
ast.target: 对此造成的不便深表歉意。但我希望您能继续享受插件及其所有新功能。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Thank you and Enjoy!
ast.target: 感谢您，祝您使用愉快！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If true, this setting will load the codeblocks in your markdownnotes with all the settings you can configure. If false it will load only the minimally required settings
ast.target: 如果为 true，此设置将在您的 Markdown 笔记中加载代码块，并应用所有可配置的设置。如果为 false，则仅加载最低要求的设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default background in your 3d scenes: either a color or transparent
ast.target: 3D 场景中的默认背景：可以是颜色或透明。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default background color for 3d scenes
ast.target: 3D 场景的默认背景颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If true, will automatically rotate your scene to get a showcase effect
ast.target: 如果为 true，将自动旋转您的场景以获得展示效果。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If true, will toggle smooth and damped orbit controls (e.g.) the model will rotate a bit more after you let go
ast.target: 如果为 true，将切换平滑且带阻尼的轨道控制（例如，松开后模型会多旋转一点）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
If true, will show a ground plane that can receive shadows from models and lights. 
Note: may impact performance, and your lightsources also need have "castshadows": true
ast.target: 如果为 true，将显示一个可以接收模型和灯光阴影的地面平面。\n注意：可能会影响性能，并且您的光源也需要设置 \"castshadows\": true。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If true, will show basic GUI options for a scene (color selector, grid checkbox) upon model load. Can also be set in the codeblock config
ast.target: 如果为 true，将在模型加载时显示场景的基本 GUI 选项（颜色选择器、网格复选框）。也可以在代码块配置中设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default size of 3d models in scene (non whole numbers should be seperated by dot, not comma)
ast.target: 场景中 3D 模型的默认大小（非整数应使用点号分隔，而非逗号）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The default position of the model in your scene (X,y,z)
ast.target: 模型在场景中的默认位置（X, y, z）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The default rotation of the model in your scene (X,y,z)
ast.target: 模型在场景中的默认旋转（X, y, z）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The default position of the camera in your scene (X,y,z)
ast.target: 场景中相机的默认位置（X, y, z）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Defaults a camera type. You can also set this per scene, in the codeblock config.
ast.target: 默认相机类型。您也可以在代码块配置中为每个场景单独设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: It is strongly recommended to keep the 2 preloaded lights
ast.target: 强烈建议保留 2 个预加载的灯光。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The position of the light in the scene (X, y, z)
ast.target: 场景中灯光的位置（X, y, z）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The target position of the light in the scene (X, y, z)
ast.target: 场景中灯光的目标位置（X, y, z）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Distance from the spotlight to the target.
ast.target: 聚光灯到目标的距离。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Angle of the spotlight (in radians).
ast.target: 聚光灯的角度（以弧度为单位）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Able or disable shadow casting for this light
ast.target: 启用或禁用此灯光的阴影投射。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default amount of columns when using grid view for multiple models
ast.target: 使用网格视图显示多个模型时的默认列数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Height of all cells in grid view (in pixels)
ast.target: 网格视图中所有单元格的高度（以像素为单位）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Width of gaps between scenes in grid view (in pixels)
ast.target: 网格视图中场景之间水平间隙的宽度（以像素为单位）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Height of gaps between scenes in grid view (in pixels)
ast.target: 网格视图中场景之间垂直间隙的高度（以像素为单位）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Advanced option: If enabled uses scissoring to use one renderer for the grid (more resource friendly). If disabled uses one renderer for each grid cell. Requires restart to take effect
ast.target: 高级选项：启用后，将使用裁剪模式，为网格使用单个渲染器（更节省资源）。禁用后，将为每个网格单元格使用单独的渲染器。更改需要重启才能生效
